name: kubeledger
desc: System of Record for Kubernetes cost accounting: per-namespace CPU, memory and GPU usage, with the 30% non-allocatable overhead made visible. Connects to AI as…
descFull: System of Record for Kubernetes cost accounting: per-namespace CPU, memory and GPU usage, with the 30% non-allocatable overhead made visible. Connects to AI assistants via MCP (Claude, Gemini, Mistral, Cursor) for plain-language analysis. Formerly Kube-Opex-Analytics.
